summary.lv: TRODO meklē affiliate un influenceru mārketinga speciālistu, kas attīstīs partneru programmas un influenceru kampaņas Skandināvijā, Baltijā un Eiropā.
summary.en: TRODO is hiring an Affiliate & Influencer Marketing Specialist to grow affiliate partnerships and influencer campaigns across Scandinavia, the Baltics and Europe.
